notes: Test new order (does not send to matching engine).

params.name: priceMatch
params.description: Only available for LIMIT/STOP/TAKE_PROFIT order. Can't be passed together with price

params.name: batchOrders
params.description: JSON array of order objects, max 5 orders

params.name: orderIdList
params.description: JSON array of orderIds, max 10

params.name: origClientOrderIdList
params.description: JSON array of client order IDs, max 10

params.name: countdownTime
params.description: Countdown time in ms. 0 to cancel timer.

params.name: batchOrders
params.description: JSON array of order modification objects, max 5 orders

params.name: multiAssetsMargin
params.description: "true": Multi-Assets Mode; "false": Single-Asset Mode

params.name: type
params.description: 1: Add position margin; 2: Reduce position margin

params.name: limit
params.description: Default: 500

params.name: algoType
params.description: Only CONDITIONAL is supported

params.name: positionSide
params.description: Default BOTH for One-way Mode; LONG or SHORT for Hedge Mode. Must be sent in Hedge Mode

params.name: type
params.description: For CONDITIONAL algoType: STOP_MARKET / TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET / STOP / TAKE_PROFIT / TRAILING_STOP_MARKET

params.name: timeInForce
params.description: IOC, GTC, FOK or GTX. Default GTC

params.name: quantity
params.description: Cannot be sent with closePosition=true (Close-All)

params.name: workingType
params.description: triggerPrice triggered by: MARK_PRICE or CONTRACT_PRICE. Default CONTRACT_PRICE

params.name: priceMatch
params.description: Only available for LIMIT/STOP/TAKE_PROFIT order. Can't be passed together with price

params.name: closePosition
params.description: Close-All, used with STOP_MARKET or TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET

params.name: priceProtect
params.description: Default FALSE. Used with STOP_MARKET or TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET. When price reaches triggerPrice, difference rate between MARK_PRICE and CONTRACT_PRICE cannot be larger than the Price Protection Threshold

params.name: reduceOnly
params.description: default "false". Cannot be sent in Hedge Mode; cannot be sent with closePosition=true

params.name: activatePrice
params.description: Used with TRAILING_STOP_MARKET orders, default as the latest price

params.name: callbackRate
params.description: Used with TRAILING_STOP_MARKET orders, min 0.1, max 10 where 1 for 1%

params.name: clientAlgoId
params.description: A unique id among open orders. Auto-generated if not sent. Pattern: ^[\.A-Z\:/a-z0-9_-]{1,36}$

params.name: newOrderRespType
params.description: Default ACK

params.name: selfTradePreventionMode
params.description: EXPIRE_TAKER: expire taker order when STP triggers; EXPIRE_MAKER: expire maker order when STP triggers; EXPIRE_BOTH: expire both orders when STP triggers. Default NONE

params.name: goodTillDate
params.description: Order cancel time for timeInForce GTD. Mandatory when timeInForce=GTD. Must be greater than current time + 600s and less than 253402300799000

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Default 100, max 300

params.name: dualSidePosition
params.description: "true": Hedge Mode; "false": One-way Mode

params.name: type
params.description: 1: Add position margin; 2: Reduce position margin

params.name: leverage
params.description: target initial leverage: int from 1 to 125

params.name: fromAsset
params.description: User spends coin

params.name: toAsset
params.description: User receives coin

params.name: fromAmount
params.description: Either fromAmount or toAmount must be sent

params.name: toAmount
params.description: Either fromAmount or toAmount must be sent

params.name: validTime
params.description: Default 10s

params.name: orderId
params.description: Either orderId or quoteId is required

params.name: quoteId
params.description: Either orderId or quoteId is required
